Shadow's paw print in snow
Katie's handwritten card: Overall, I love you more than I want to strangle you
A repeated figure moves from a dark interior toward an open door and amber horizon
Cover of Now That I'm Still Here by Christopher J. Carazas
Shadow resting in warm evening light beside a copy of Now That I'm Still Here
Handwritten card from Katie reading: You will never understand just how ridiculously happy your existence makes me
The physical memoir stands beside three layered paper purchase inserts in an amber and charcoal collage
Shadow resting beside a stack of copies of Now That I'm Still Here and a chew
Cover of Now That I'm Still Here by Christopher J. Carazas
Katie's handwriting: ridiculously happy your existence makes me
Contact sheet of Katie cards, Shadow photographs, paw print, and the memoir
Handwritten card from Katie: There really are no good words for this. Except maybe swear words. Like lots and lots of swear words.
Handwritten card from Katie: May your ugly Christmas sweater not be confused with a Cosby sweater.
Handwritten card from Katie: Overall, I love you more than I want to strangle you. #winning
Handwritten card from Katie: You will never understand just how ridiculously happy your existence makes me.
Handwritten card from Katie: At least you’re not as old as you will be next year. Happy birthday.
Handwritten card from Katie: Chris, I’m sorry the president sucks. But everything WILL be alright.
Shadow wearing a striped bow tie beneath a blue sky, presented as editor in chief of the Plymouth Sentinel and Canine Gazette

Katie's handwritten card telling Christopher that his existence made her ridiculously happy
